description_long: This is a reusable travel cup with a cylindrical shape, featuring a vibrant red lid and a matching red ribbed silicone sleeve for insulation and grip. The main body of the cup is adorned with a decorative pattern of colorful birds and small flowers on a cream background, giving it a cheerful and lively appearance. The lid is designed with a small drinking spout, typical of takeaway coffee cups, and fits snugly onto the cup to prevent spills. The silicone sleeve wraps around the middle section, providing both thermal insulation and a non-slip surface for holding. The cup appears to be made primarily of a lightweight ceramic or bamboo composite, with the lid and sleeve made of silicone. Its size and design suggest it is intended for carrying hot beverages like coffee or tea in urban environments.
description: A decorative travel cup with a red silicone lid and sleeve, featuring a bird and flower pattern on a cream body. Designed for carrying hot drinks, it combines style and practicality.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red lid, ribbed silicone sleeve, and bird pattern clearly visible on the cream body.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the drinking spout on the lid and more of the bird and flower motif.
description_view_2: Back view with the red lid and sleeve prominent, and a different section of the decorative pattern visible.
description_view_3: Side view showing the full height of the cup, the sleeve's texture, and the continuous decorative artwork.
